prompts.title: Value Debate (2026): RX 9070 XT or RTX 5070 Ti for a fixed $1000 GPU budget?
prompts.body: Assume current street pricing and a 1440p-focused build. Which card is the smarter buy, and what tradeoff matters most in your pick (raw raster, RT, efficiency, resale, or driver experience)?
prompts.first_comment: Please include your current market price assumptions and whether you'd choose new or used.
risk_notes: Must verify subreddit title/content rules right before posting.
Check for near-duplicate topic in recent thread history.

prompts.title: CB1 Debate: Elite upside with injury risk vs safer year-to-year consistency?
prompts.body: When your team is drafting in the top half of Round 1, do you prioritize higher ceiling with recent injury risk, or a lower-variance profile with strong recent tape? Explain your threshold for risk.
prompts.first_comment: Frame your answer using floor/ceiling, injury confidence, and team timeline (win-now vs build).
risk_notes: Keep framing archetypal to reduce player-specific pile-on.
Verify community rules on repetitive prospect threads.
